source_document: Texas HB 149 (Relating to the creation and distribution of certain manipulated media)
passage_text: "Deep fake video" means a video, created with the intent to deceive, that appears to depict a real person performing an action that did not occur in reality and that was created using machine learning or artificial intelligence, including a generative adversarial network. "Distribute" means to publish, transfer, or otherwise make available to the public, including making available through a social media platform or through any other mass communication medium.

definition.definition_text: a video, created with the intent to deceive, that appears to depict a real person performing an action that did not occur in reality and that was created using machine learning or artificial intelligence, including a generative adversarial network
definition.scope: Videos created with AI/ML that falsely depict real persons
